env.name: sim_ragsr
post_install_commands: pip install --timeout 120 --retries 5 category-encoders==2.8.1 deap==1.4.4 dill==0.4.1 lightgbm==4.6.0 linear-tree==0.3.5 mlxtend==0.23.4 sklearn2pmml==0.130.0 smt==2.13.0 umap-learn==0.5.12 hdfe==0.0.4 scorch==0.2.0 seaborn==0.13.2 matplotlib==3.10.9 cachetools==6.2.6 gplearn==0.4.2 faiss-cpu==1.13.0 skorch==1.2.0 shap==0.49.1 xgboost==2.1.4 pytest
env.comments: RAG-SR / EvolutionaryForest 环境；用 post_install_commands 控制安装顺序，避免 tpot/xgboost 最新依赖触发源码构建

adapter.equation_notes: 基于 EvolutionaryForestRegressor 的 RAG-SR；当前 benchmark 默认 categorical_encoding=null，适配数值型符号回归数据并避开旧 category_encoders 与 sklearn 的兼容问题。
